arts.ttl: Deco includes La Masia talent in Barca’s left-back plans
arts.sum: Teenage defender Jofre Torrents is fast emerging as a possible option as he has been playing a starring role for Juliano Belletti’s Juvenil A team. Barcelona are thinking about full-back options ahead of the summer transfer window as they look to strengthen both positions.

arts.ttl: ‘Doing a great job’ - Laporta raves about Flick and tells Barca fans to ‘keep dreaming’
arts.sum: Joan Laporta has shown his appreciation for first-team boss Hansi Flick and says the German coach is doing a great job at Barcelona. We have a great coach who knows how to manage the team in an extraordinary way,” he added.

arts.ttl: Why Gavi did not play a minute in Barcelona’s win over Atlético
arts.sum: An insight into the reasoning behind Barcelona star Gavi’s lack of minutes in the club’s latest outing has been forthcoming online. Barcelona were of course back in action on Wednesday…

arts.ttl: How many times could Barcelona face Real Madrid before the end of the season?
arts.sum: The latest edition of Spanish football’s fiercest rivalry was of course pencilled in on Wednesday night. This came after Real Madrid’s victory over Real Sociedad in the Copa del Rey…

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick pushing for Barcelona stars to have their own residence at club’s training ground
arts.sum: An interesting story surrounding the plans of Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick for his players has on Thursday come to the fore online. This comes amid confirmation that the German…

arts.ttl: Wojciech Szczęsny sends message to future Polish players on playing for Barcelona
arts.sum: Barcelona star Wojciech Szczęsny has forwarded a message of advice and encouragement to future Polish players, regarding a possible future with the club. Goalkeeper Szczęsny is for his part of…
